query:
SELECT 'veiculos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM veiculos WHERE empresaId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'funcionarios', COUNT(*) FROM funcionarios WHERE empresaId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'abastecimentos', COUNT(*) FROM abastecimentos WHERE empresaId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'manutencoes', COUNT(*) FROM manutencoes WHERE empresaId = 1;
